title: Template V2 Recipe
description: A recipe is a directorial 'shot vocabulary entry' — it combines layers into a complete cinematographic style for a scene archetype. Dispatcher scores recipes against the scene context; best match wins; executor runs layers in order.

name.description: Unique recipe id across the registry. Must match the filename stem.

template.description: V1.3 batch-2: force the V1.1 template builder for this recipe, overriding whatever the LLM family classifier chose. Omit entirely when any template is acceptable (e.g. _default). Use `in` membership on the executor side, never .get() — absent must mean absent, not null/empty.

applies_when.description: Matching rules scored by the dispatcher. All fields are optional; missing = any.

layers.description: Named layer references, keyed by slot. Slots run in canonical order: base, environment, composition, lighting, animation, ambient, post.

ambient.description: Single or list of ambient layers (dust + fog + birds together).

overrides.description: Per-slot override dicts applied on top of the referenced layer's `applies`. Same structure as each layer's `applies`.
